'''kogavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:icecold|icecold]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:icecold|icecold]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kogavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogavithi|kogavithi]] || [[word:kogaviji|kogaviji]] || [[word:kogavishi|kogavishi]] || [[word:kogaviki|kogaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogavuthuthu|kogavuthuthu]] || [[word:kogavujuju|kogavujuju]] || [[word:kogavushushu|kogavushushu]] || [[word:kogavukuku|kogavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogavuthu|kogavuthu]] || [[word:kogavuju|kogavuju]] || [[word:kogavushu|kogavushu]] || [[word:kogavuku|kogavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogavufthuf|kogavufthuf]] || [[word:kogavufjuf|kogavufjuf]] || [[word:kogavufshuf|kogavufshuf]] || [[word:kogavufkuf|kogavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogavethe|kogavethe]] || [[word:kogaveje|kogaveje]] || [[word:kogaveshe|kogaveshe]] || [[word:kogaveke|kogaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogavothotho|kogavothotho]] || [[word:kogavojojo|kogavojojo]] || [[word:kogavoshosho|kogavoshosho]] || [[word:kogavokoko|kogavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogavotho|kogavotho]] || [[word:kogavojo|kogavojo]] || [[word:kogavosho|kogavosho]] || [[word:kogavoko|kogavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogavofthof|kogavofthof]] || [[word:kogavofjof|kogavofjof]] || [[word:kogavofshof|kogavofshof]] || [[word:kogavofkof|kogavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfthÃŸf|kogavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfjÃŸf|kogavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfshÃŸf|kogavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfkÃŸf|kogavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kogavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kogavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kogavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kogavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfthÃŸf|kogavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfjÃŸf|kogavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfshÃŸf|kogavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfkÃŸf|kogavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfthÃŸf|kogavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfjÃŸf|kogavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfshÃŸf|kogavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogavÃŸfkÃŸf|kogavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogavÃḊthÃḊ|kogavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kogavÃḊjÃḊ|kogavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kogavÃḊshÃḊ|kogavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kogavÃḊkÃḊ|kogavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogavathatha|kogavathatha]] || [[word:kogavajaja|kogavajaja]] || [[word:kogavashasha|kogavashasha]] || [[word:kogavakaka|kogavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogavatha|kogavatha]] || [[word:kogavaja|kogavaja]] || [[word:kogavasha|kogavasha]] || [[word:kogavaka|kogavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogavafthaf|kogavafthaf]] || [[word:kogavafjaf|kogavafjaf]] || [[word:kogavafshaf|kogavafshaf]] || [[word:kogavafkaf|kogavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kogavasha|kogavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kogavshÃḋsha|kogavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kogavrosha|kogavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kogavmusha|kogavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kogavyasha|kogavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokogavnkshÃḋsha|gokogavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokogavnkrosha|gokogavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokogavnkmusha|gokogavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokogavnkyasha|gokogavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kogagavasha|kogagavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kogagavshÃḋsha|kogagavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kogagavrosha|kogagavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kogagavmusha|kogagavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kogagavyasha|kogagavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokogagavnkshÃḋsha|gokogagavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokogagavnkrosha|gokogagavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokogagavnkmusha|gokogagavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokogagavnkyasha|gokogagavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kegÃḊvasha|kegÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kegÃḊvshÃḋsha|kegÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kegÃḊvrosha|kegÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kegÃḊvmusha|kegÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kegÃḊvyasha|kegÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokegÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gokegÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokegÃḊvnkrosha|gokegÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokegÃḊvnkmusha|gokegÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokegÃḊvnkyasha|gokegÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kogfavasha|kogfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kogfavshÃḋsha|kogfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kogfavrosha|kogfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kogfavmusha|kogfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kogfavyasha|kogfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokogfavnkshÃḋsha|gokogfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokogfavnkrosha|gokogfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokogfavnkmusha|gokogfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokogfavnkyasha|gokogfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
